data.description:

An announcement from Boom Logistics Ltd ( (AU:BOL) ) is now available.

Boom Logistics is continuing its on-market share buy-back program for its ordinary fully paid shares listed on the ASX under ticker BOL. The company is using this capital management tool to adjust its share base, which can influence ownership concentration and potentially enhance value for remaining shareholders.

In an updated notification dated 23 April 2026, Boom Logistics reported that a cumulative 2,274,911 shares had been repurchased prior to the latest trading day. A further 65,759 shares were bought back on the previous day, signaling ongoing execution of the buy-back that may incrementally impact liquidity and the stock’s free float over time.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:BOL) stock is a Buy with a A$2.48 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Boom Logistics Ltd stock, see the AU:BOL Stock Forecast page.

More about Boom Logistics Ltd

Boom Logistics Ltd is an Australian-listed company trading under the ASX code BOL, with its ordinary fully paid shares subject to market buy-back activity. The group operates within the logistics and related services sector, using capital management initiatives such as on-market share buy-backs to manage its equity base and shareholder structure.

data.title: Native Mineral Resources lifts Blackjack output and advances Podosky feed
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Native Mineral Resources Holdings Ltd. ( (AU:NMR) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Native Mineral Resources has reported the first gold output since restarting mining at its Blackjack operation in Queensland, smelting five doré bars totalling about 315 ounces from freshly mined Blackjack South Stage 2a ore. The company says the new material is beginning to replace lower-grade Far Fanning stockpiles, with plant recoveries holding at 94% to 96%, low tailings grades, and mill utilisation around 84%, underpinning expectations for improved grades and stronger gold production through 2026.

Cumulative April doré production has reached roughly 530 ounces, taking total output since the plant’s recommissioning in mid-2025 to about 8,272 ounces, with more than 2,387 ounces of gold outturn confirmed so far. In parallel, NMR has begun site establishment and mobilised a mining fleet at the Podosky deposit, 75km east of Blackjack, keeping first ore haulage to the Blackjack ROM pad on track for late April and positioning the business to run two active ore sources for greater feed flexibility and blend optimisation.

More about Native Mineral Resources Holdings Ltd.

Native Mineral Resources Holdings Ltd. is an Australian gold producer focused on developing and operating projects in northern Queensland. The company’s core activities centre on the Blackjack processing plant and associated satellite deposits, where it processes ore into doré bars for refining and gold sales.

Average Trading Volume: 3,591,123

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: A$57.13M

data.title: Vantea Smart Approves 2025 Accounts as R&D Push Weighs on Earnings
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Vantea Smart S.p.A. ( (IT:VNT) ) has issued an update.

Vantea Smart’s board has approved the 2025 consolidated and statutory financial statements, reporting a decline in key metrics as revenues fell 12.2% to €8m and group net profit nearly halved to €0.3m, while EBITDA slipped 4.6% to €1.8m and net financial position moved to €4m. Management attributes the softer top line and profitability mainly to reallocating resources to complete two funded R&D projects, Cyberlens and WTTM, and to launch ERP SuiteX, which has reshaped the offering and is intended to drive a shift toward higher-margin, recurring software revenues and expanded AI‑driven solutions, potentially strengthening the company’s long‑term competitive position in cybersecurity.

More about Vantea Smart S.p.A.

Vantea Smart S.p.A. is an Italian information technology company and innovative SME listed on Euronext Growth Milan, operating as a national reference player in cybersecurity. The group offers end-to-end cybersecurity services, specialist consulting and proprietary software solutions that cover the entire security lifecycle and support corporate risk management and digital resilience.

data.title: Yandal boosts drilling drive at Ironstone Well–Barwidgee after high-grade gold hits
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Yandal Resources Ltd. ( (AU:YRL) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Yandal Resources has ramped up activity at its Ironstone Well–Barwidgee gold project, commissioning a 21-person exploration camp and core yard to support continuous multi-rig drilling and a ~30,000-metre program in the first half of 2026. The company ended the March quarter with about $14.7 million in cash, providing a solid funding base for its expanded campaign across multiple prospects.

Recent reverse circulation drilling at the Arrakis Caladan target confirmed laterally continuous gold mineralisation in fresh rock over roughly 1.2 kilometres of strike, which remains open to the southeast and shows higher grades along the eastern hanging-wall contact. Additional air-core work has extended regolith anomalies and parallel targets, while high-grade shallow intercepts at the Salusa prospect within the New England Granite complex underscore the potential for multiple mineralised systems across the 4km-by-2km intrusive body.

The establishment of on-site fuel storage and upgraded logistics at IWB is expected to improve operational efficiency as RC and diamond drilling proceed at Salusa, Nayla, Arrakis and Flushing Meadows. Collectively, the strong drilling results and expanded infrastructure position Yandal to accelerate resource growth and enhance the exploration upside of its flagship Western Australian gold project, with implications for its future project pipeline and competitiveness within the regional gold exploration sector.

More about Yandal Resources Ltd.

Yandal Resources Ltd. is an Australian gold exploration company listed on the ASX, focused on advancing its 100%-owned Ironstone Well–Barwidgee (IWB) project in Western Australia. The company targets greenfields and brownfields gold discoveries, with current exploration centred on the Arrakis, Flushing Meadows and New England Granite target areas within a broader granite-intrusive and greenstone belt setting.

Average Trading Volume: 190,600

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: A$83.93M

For a thorough assessment of YRL stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: NZX flags resilient growth and rising cashflow at 2026 shareholder meeting
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from NZX ( (NZSTF) ).

NZX used its 2026 annual shareholders’ meeting to highlight steady strategic progress since 2018, with operating earnings nearly doubling and strong growth in funds under management and administration across its Smart and Wealth Technologies businesses. The exchange group stressed its resilience, focus on cost control and margin improvement, and noted that cashflow is now rising faster than net profit due to past investment in technology and acquisitions.

Chair John McMahon said NZX has outperformed the wider New Zealand market on shareholder returns and is benefiting from long‑term structural tailwinds despite recent geopolitical volatility affecting asset prices and capital markets activity. He also reported that Wealth Technologies has turned cashflow‑positive and continues to gain market share, while NZX deepens engagement with the government and regulators to stimulate local capital markets and maintain fair, efficient and transparent market settings.

More about NZX

NZX Limited operates New Zealand’s primary securities exchange and related financial markets infrastructure, connecting companies and investors for capital raising and trading. The group has expanded into funds management through its Smart platform and investment administration via NZX Wealth Technologies, giving it exposure to equity market growth, ETFs and KiwiSaver flows.

GFL Environmental ( (TSE:GFL) ) just unveiled an update.

GFL Environmental Inc. has called its 2026 annual and special meeting of shareholders for May 13, 2026, to be held in a live, virtual-only audio webcast format, allowing broad participation regardless of location. Holders of subordinate voting shares, multiple voting shares, and Series A and B convertible preferred shares of record as of April 13, 2026, are entitled to vote at the meeting.

Shareholders will be asked to receive the audited financial statements for the year ended December 31, 2025, elect directors, appoint the external auditor and authorize its remuneration, and renew both the Omnibus Long-Term Incentive Plan and the Director DSU Plan. The agenda also includes an advisory, non-binding vote on the company’s approach to executive compensation, underscoring governance and pay practices that could influence investor sentiment and alignment between management and shareholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:GFL) stock is a Buy with a C$65.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on GFL Environmental stock, see the TSE:GFL Stock Forecast page.

data.title: Vanda Pharmaceuticals Adds Independent Director to Strengthen Board
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Vanda ( (VNDA) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On April 22, 2026, Vanda Pharmaceuticals Inc. expanded its Board of Directors from six to seven members and appointed Charles C. Duncan, Ph.D., as an independent Class II director, with his initial term running until the 2026 annual shareholders’ meeting. Duncan will receive restricted stock units with an initial grant-date value of $390,000 that vest over four years, ongoing annual equity awards valued at $260,000 vesting after one year, a $50,000 annual cash fee, and standard indemnification consistent with other directors.

Duncan, a veteran biotechnology equity research analyst and President of life sciences advisory firm Sulci Advisors, brings nearly three decades of Wall Street and sector expertise, including leadership roles at Cantor Fitzgerald, Piper Jaffray and JMP Securities, with a focus on neurology, psychiatry and platform-enabled therapeutics. His addition further strengthens the independence and industry depth of Vanda’s board at a time when the company highlights recent product approvals and an expanding pipeline, underscoring its ambitions for continued growth and value creation for patients, payors and shareholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (VNDA) stock is a Buy with a $24.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Vanda stock, see the VNDA Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on VNDA Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, VNDA is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak financial performance—deepening losses, heavy cash burn, and equity erosion—despite low leverage. Offsetting this are strong technical momentum and a balanced but improving business outlook from the earnings call, including revenue growth guidance and recent approvals, though near-term cash burn and execution risks remain significant.

To see Spark’s full report on VNDA stock, click here.

More about Vanda

Vanda Pharmaceuticals Inc. is a global biopharmaceutical company focused on developing and commercializing innovative therapies to address high unmet medical needs and improve patients’ lives. The company has a long history of innovation in central nervous system disorders and markets products such as Fanapt, NEREUS and BYSANTI, while advancing a growing pipeline targeting CNS and other serious conditions.

data.title: Apimeds Faces NYSE Non-Compliance Over Delayed 10-K Filing
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from Apimeds Pharmaceuticals US, Inc. ( (APUS) ) is now available.

On April 17, 2026, Apimeds Pharmaceuticals US, Inc. received a non-compliance notice from NYSE Regulation after failing to timely file its Form 10-K for the fiscal year ended Dec. 31, 2025, triggering application of the exchange’s late-filer rules. The company attributed the delay to ongoing preparation of fourth-quarter and full-year financial statements and additional audit work, and had previously flagged these issues in a March 31, 2026 Form 12b-25.

Under the NYSE American’s framework, Apimeds has an initial cure period running to Oct. 15, 2026 to file the overdue Form 10-K, during which the exchange will monitor its reporting status and any subsequent delayed filings. The company’s stock will remain listed under APUS with a “.LF” late-filer designation, while an April 2, 2026 trading halt remains in effect and the exchange retains broad discretion to truncate the cure period and move to suspend or delist the shares if reporting delays persist or continued listing is deemed inadvisable.

More about Apimeds Pharmaceuticals US, Inc.

Apimeds Pharmaceuticals US, Inc. operates in the pharmaceutical industry and is listed on the NYSE American under the ticker symbol APUS. The company focuses on developing and commercializing drug products, positioning itself within the U.S. healthcare and life sciences market as a publicly traded pharmaceutical issuer subject to SEC reporting and exchange compliance obligations.

Average Trading Volume: 182,622

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: $23.64M

Learn more about APUS stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
